title: The Seraphim Hunt Everyone
description: On pages 13–15, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Lilith, Unknown person #15, Vegapunk, Franky as The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.
scene: The Seraphim turn against everyone, a traitor among Vegapunk’s satellites emerges, and Egghead becomes the center of a coming world-shaking incident.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I told you the bubble gun works!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: GYAA!! Franky's turning into a stone!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: THAT'S NOT GOOD, HE'S GOING TO DIE!!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Damn it, I'm turning into stone!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's the Cipher Pol that came here in the past!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Who on earth did this to you?!

summary: This part advances the Egghead Betrayal through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
